summary: The protagonist encounters a dragon in the Lipa Desert, who recognizes him as an adventurer rather than a hatchling due to his connection to someone named Leon. The dragon agrees to help the protagonist reach the Eastern Continent by altering a barrier, hoping to facilitate future encounters. Upon arriving at the Eastern Continent, the protagonist explores the unfamiliar terrain and eventually reaches Haju City, where he seeks information regarding the Heavenly Demon Dark Arts.
key_moments: The protagonist encounters a dragon who distinguishes him from another adventurer named Leon.
The dragon transports the protagonist to the Eastern Continent by altering a protective barrier.
The protagonist arrives in the Eastern Continent and arrives at Haju City to continue his search for the Heavenly Demon Dark Arts.
